# PERF-064 negative: c.Copy() is called and a WaitGroup keeps the goroutine tied to the request
lang: go
file: PERF-064-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func AsyncHandlerSafe(c *gin.Context) {
	defer c.Request.Body.Close()
	var workerCount = 1
	_ = workerCount
	ctx := c.Copy()
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(1)
	go func() {
		ctx.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
		wg.Done()
	}()
	wg.Wait()
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
